title: Sending Attachments
drDigitalIntro:
An attachment is a file you add to an email.
• It can be a photo, document, or spreadsheet.
• Click the Attach button to open a file picker, then choose the file you want.
• Never open attachments from strangers — they can contain viruses.

playgroundTask.goal: You attached a file and sent it

steps.say: Click Compose to start a new email.
Click the Attach button to open the file picker.
Type a message in the body: 'Hi! Here is the photo from our beach trip. Enjoy!'
Click Send to deliver the email with the attachment.

drDigitalSuccess: You attached a file and sent it! Click the Attach button whenever you need to add a photo or document.
drDigitalHint: Click Compose, fill in To and Subject, then click the Attach button and pick VacationPhoto.png from the list.
